text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: MMLEADS │ August 2021 │ V 1.0 96 

MDCR_ONLY_MOS 

LABEL: Medicare Only Months 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the number of months during the year that the beneficiary was enrolled in Medicare — 
and not dually eligible for full Medicare-Medicaid benefits. 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: MBSF (derived) 

VALUES: 0–12, or null/missing (if no Medicaid enrollment) 

COMMENT: CCW calculates this variable as the count of months where a beneficiary is
